# G-Dimension

> G-Dimension is a digital build journal for car enthusiasts — a place to log every modification, part, service, receipt, and photo for each of your cars in one permanent, searchable record, and share a clean public build profile.

G-Dimension (gdimension.app) is a free web app (PWA). Owners document their cars privately — modifications with specs and costs, maintenance history, a chronological build timeline — and can optionally publish a public build profile at `https://gdimension.app/builds/{username}` showing the car's identity, build sheet (parts and specs, never costs unless the owner opts in), timeline, and photos. Financial records, documents, VINs, and license plates are always private.

## Pages

- [Home / product overview](https://gdimension.app/): what G-Dimension is, features, FAQ, and signup
- [Sign up](https://gdimension.app/signup): create a free account
- [Terms of Service](https://gdimension.app/terms): the terms governing use of the service
- [Privacy Policy](https://gdimension.app/privacy): what data is collected and how it is used

## Public build profiles

- Owner-published build pages live at `https://gdimension.app/builds/{username}` — public, no login required
- [Sitemap of public builds](https://gdimension.app/sitemap-builds.xml): machine-readable list of published build profiles

## Optional

- [robots.txt](https://gdimension.app/robots.txt): crawler policy (AI crawlers welcome)
- [Sitemap](https://gdimension.app/sitemap.xml): static public URLs
